Literature

Writing & Ideas

Reviews, essays, and long-form pieces on the books and ideas that define our time.

## What We Read Literature, for us, is anything written with intention. That includes novels and essays, but also manifestos, policy papers, and the occasional well-crafted thread. We care about *how* ideas are communicated as much as *which* ideas. --- ## Our Critical Standard We don't publish summaries. A review from Follow or Bounce will tell you what a book *does*, not just what it's *about*. We're interested in argument, structure, and implication. We're also honest about books we think are overrated. A publication that praises everything means nothing. --- ## Recent Reading - On the resurgence of the long essay - Why the best technology writing reads like fiction - The books every infrastructure engineer should read - Reading contracts as literature [Subscribe for updates →](/subscribe/)
